artifact_categories.label: Protocol
artifact_categories.description: Question framing, scope, inclusion/exclusion logic, model scope, or regulatory context.

artifact_categories.label: Retrieval
artifact_categories.description: Search strategy, source query, data pull, or upstream evidence collection artifact.

artifact_categories.label: Evidence Map
artifact_categories.description: Traceable graph or map linking records, claims, parameters, or findings to evidence signals.

artifact_categories.label: Human Review
artifact_categories.description: Reviewer queue, reviewer decisions, overrides, adjudication, and review notes.

artifact_categories.label: Extraction
artifact_categories.description: Structured study, model input, claim, benefit-risk, or hypothesis extraction.

artifact_categories.label: Validation
artifact_categories.description: Performance metrics, validation report, audit completeness, and fixture-only warnings.

artifact_categories.label: Report
artifact_categories.description: Final markdown, dossier, briefing, evidence table, PRISMA summary, or hypothesis report.

artifact_categories.label: Audit
artifact_categories.description: Project manifest, audit trail, source provenance, script metadata, and hash references.

fixture_warning: These results are from sample fixture data and are not validation evidence.
